//: Standard package.json scripts template for CLI/tool packages
//usage: CLI tools and utilities built with tsup for optimal bundling

//notes.description: Use this template for CLI tools and command-line utilities
//notes.why_tsup: tsup provides better bundling for CLIs with automatic format detection (ESM/CJS)

differences_from_library.build_tool: Uses tsup instead of tsc for better CLI bundling
differences_from_library.no_test_ui: CLI tools typically don't need vitest UI
